newConversation.title: New conversation
newConversation.typeHint: Type at least 2 characters to find a contact

consent.tryAgain: Try again before sending a text.
consent.missingDetail: Verify prior service-message permission before texting this contact.

pendingStop.title: SMS STOP request is still processing
pendingStop.detail: Wait for the inbound opt-out to finish processing. Prior permission cannot override STOP.

optedOut.title: This phone number opted out of SMS
optedOut.detail: They must text START before staff can send another message.

dnd.title: SMS is blocked by Do Not Disturb
dnd.detail: Another contact with this phone number has Do Not Disturb enabled.

unavailable.title: SMS permission cannot be recorded
unavailable.detail: Confirm the contact and phone number before trying again.

consentAttestation.title: Record verified SMS permission
consentAttestation.intro: Record this only after verifying {{contact}} gave Utah Pros permission to send service-related texts. Contact existence alone is not permission.
consentAttestation.evidencePlaceholder: Example: Recorded call at 2:14 PM, or authorization stored in Job Documents
consentAttestation.evidenceHint: At least 10 characters ({{count}}/500). The source, consent date, your staff identity, trusted request IP, and server timestamp will be kept in consent history.
consentAttestation.confirm: I verified this person gave Utah Pros Restoration permission to send service-related texts about their requested work, and has not revoked it. This does not clear STOP or Do Not Disturb.

composer.dndBlock: Do Not Disturb is on — texting is blocked
composer.dndNote: Do Not Disturb is on — you can still add an internal note
